See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 224302 => 'Fria', 2243031 => 'Boké', 2243032 => 'Kamsar', 2243041 => 'Conakry', 2243042 => 'Sangoya', 2243043 => 'Conakry', 2243045 => 'Conakry', 2243046 => 'Boussoura', 2243047 => 'Conakry', 2243051 => 'Labé', 2243053 => 'Pita', 2243061 => 'Kindia', 22430613 => 'Télimélé', 2243068 => 'Mamou', 2243069 => 'Dalaba', 224307 => 'Kankan', 224308 => 'Faranah', 2243091 => 'N\'Zérékoré', 2243094 => 'Macenta', 2243097 => 'Guéckédou', 2243098 => 'Kissidougou', ];
